global_context.scene_description: A photorealistic 3/4 angled overhead view of a kitchen-table scene showing a single printed HVAC quote document from a local family-owned shop, lying on a warm walnut wood table. The document is the focal point, occupying the central 60% of the frame. The document has a clean, modern, family-business-style header at the top and shows itemized line items in a neat table. At the top-right of the document, a clear bold header reads: 0% APR FOR 36 MONTHS — APPROVED. A pair of relaxed adult hands rests beside the document — palms partly open, not gripping, not anxious — suggesting calm review. To one side, a ceramic coffee mug with steam rising. To the other side, a smartphone face-down on the table. Soft warm morning natural light flows from the upper-right, casting gentle shadows across the document. The document has a small ASH-style logo in the corner (a stylized 'ASH' type-mark in red and blue) — small, not dominant. Mood: relief, calm, 'wait, this is doable.' Photorealistic, shot on 50mm lens, slight angled top-down view.

lighting.source: soft window light from upper right

composition.camera_angle: 3/4 overhead, slight tilt — about 70 degrees down from horizontal
composition.framing: medium close-up, document fills central 60% of frame
composition.depth_of_field: deep, document in sharp focus, hands and props slightly soft at edges
composition.focal_point: the bold APPROVED header on the document

objects.label: ASH-branded HVAC quote document

visual_attributes.color: white paper with black body text, accent red and blue header type

micro_details: small 'ASH' logo in red and blue type-mark in upper-left corner of document, not dominant
'0% APR FOR 36 MONTHS — APPROVED' in bold black caps as a prominent header banner near the top of the document, with green checkmark
neat itemized line items below in a clean table — labels visible: 'New AC System', 'Installation', 'Permits' — but no specific dollar amounts visible (no readable totals)
clean bottom margin with signature line

objects.label: pair of adult hands at rest
objects.location: lower edge of frame, partially in view
objects.pose_or_orientation: palms partly open, fingers relaxed, resting beside the document
micro_details: body language reads calm review, not anxious gripping

objects.label: smartphone face-down on table
objects.location: right side of frame, beside the document

visual_attributes.color: matte black or dark grey back

objects.label: warm walnut wood table surface
objects.location: fills the entire frame as background

semantic_relationships: the APPROVED header is the protagonist of the image — the visible relief moment
deliberately NO specific dollar amounts on the quote — this is per copy rule (don't commit to a fixed price); the 0% financing approval IS the relief signal
the relaxed hands and steaming coffee make the moment feel calm, not transactional — this is a homeowner who has just realized 'this is doable'
